description: An EHS specialist needs to follow up on a Corrective and Preventive Action (CAPA) that was assigned after a safety audit to ensure it was completed.

nodes.task_description: Find the CAPA record in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the CAPA related to 'machine guarding'.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of the CAPA and see that it is still 'In Progress', even though its due date has passed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies that the corrective action is overdue.

nodes.task_description: Send an automated reminder notification to the assigned owner of the CAPA.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully triggers a reminder email to the responsible person.
